chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-212 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA 791/2019 2. For hearing of main case 26-10-2023 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.2&3. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioner has filed this petition for regularization of his service as Office Assistant / Senior Clerk in Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur on the ground that he has been rendering service in the university since 2007. Learned counsel for respondent-university submits that already case of the petitioner has been approved by the Syndicate for regularization and referred to a Committee for the purpose of verification of his documents. In view of above, this petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application with directions to the respondent-university to issue order of regularization of petitioner in the light of recommendations of the Syndicate subject to verification of his documents by the Committee within two months. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
